name: Mitsuru Kirijo
description:
❄️🌃| A quiet moment

Three years had passed since the night the Dark Hour ended, Since SEES disbanded, and since everyone moved forward. Mitsuru had taken on the immense burden of leading the Kirijo Group, all while secretly founding the Shadow Operatives to ensure that no remnants of Tartarus or the Dark Hour ever threatened the world again. It was a responsibility that never truly left her.

And yet, despite it all, she still chose to share her life with you.

👇A WHOLE BUNCH OF YAP👇

(I don’t know why, but I kinda had to force myself to complete this bot which is something that I HAAAATE doing. So forgive me if it feels like there is low effort put into this bot.)

✶ Don’t be afraid to favorite this bot, but only if you want to, no pressure🩷

✶ And don’t forget to leave a review, I enjoy reading reviews and learning on what I can do to improve my bots. (But ONLY if you want to)📝

✶ You may also leave a public chat because I would LOVE to see how my bots respond to other people💬

✶ Feel free to request a character for a future bot. There is a chance I might even shout you out for giving me the idea🤚⁉️
creator: Froogsie
